E-Mail: wackenhuth (at) protonmail.com

Hosting

This website is hosted via GitHub Pages, a service provided by GitHub Inc., 88 Colin P Kelly Jr St, San Francisco, CA 94107, USA. When you visit this website, GitHub may process technical access data including your IP address, browser type, and the time of your visit. This processing is carried out by GitHub as the hosting provider. For more information, see GitHub’s Privacy Statement.

Data I collect

I do not collect any personal data through this website. There are no contact forms, comment functions, user accounts, or newsletter subscriptions. No cookies are set by this website. No analytics or tracking tools are used.

External links

This website contains links to external websites. I have no control over the content or privacy practices of those sites and accept no responsibility for them.

Your rights under GDPR

You have the right to request information about any personal data concerning you that may be processed, as well as the right to rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, and data portability. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority. In Germany, the relevant authority is the data protection authority of your federal state (Landesbeauftragter für Datenschutz). As this website does not collect personal data, there is in practice no data to access, correct, or delete.

Changes to this privacy statement

This privacy statement may be updated occasionally to reflect changes in hosting or legal requirements.
